prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

you need to do ALL of these, each one gets its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

the copy should be compelling, on-brand, and like actually production ready

use all your tools to get this done. do everything, don't skip anything. i want to see every single file written. make sure it's thorough and complete

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content:
Headline: Meet Lumina—the smart desk lamp that knows your day.

Work, meet, and unwind in the light that always feels right. Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar, and the room around you, so you can stay focused without lifting a finger.

From crisp morning clarity to warm evening calm, Lumina takes care of the lighting details that quietly shape your energy and mood. It’s modern, beautiful, and built for the way remote work actually happens.

Set it up once, then let Lumina handle the rest—so you can do your best work in the best light.

Email 1 — Announcement
Subject: Introducing Lumina: light that adapts to your day

Hi there,

Meet Lumina, the smart desk lamp built for remote work. It automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar, and ambient room light—so your lighting stays perfect without you thinking about it.

No more harsh glare during morning focus time. No more dim, sleepy lighting during that 3 p.m. meeting. Lumina quietly optimizes your workspace to help you feel alert, comfortable, and ready for whatever’s on your schedule.

Lumina launches today for $149.

Ready to work in a better light?

[Shop Lumina]

— The Lumina Team

---
Email 2 — Benefits & Social Proof
Subject: Why your desk lighting matters more than you think

Hi there,

Great lighting doesn’t just look nice—it changes how you feel and perform. Lumina’s adaptive system balances brightness and warmth throughout the day, reducing eye strain and helping you stay focused longer.

Here’s what makes Lumina different:
• Time-based lighting that supports your energy rhythm
• Calendar-aware adjustments for meetings and deep work
• Ambient light sensing that keeps your space comfortable

Lumina is designed for real-world remote work—simple setup, modern design, and the “it just works” experience you want.

See how Lumina upgrades your workspace in minutes.

[Get Lumina]

— The Lumina Team

---
Email 3 — Launch Reminder / Urgency
Subject: Last chance to upgrade your workspace this week

Hi there,

If your desk lighting still relies on manual adjustments, Lumina is your upgrade. One lamp, always the right light—morning, mid-day, or late-night wind down.

Lumina is available now for $149 and ships immediately. Make the switch this week and feel the difference in focus, comfort, and clarity.

Ready to let your light do the thinking?

[Shop Lumina]

— The Lumina Team

Twitter/X
1) Your desk light shouldn’t be another task. Lumina auto-adjusts brightness + color temp based on time of day, calendar events, and room light. Built for remote work. $149. #WorkFromHome #Productivity

2) Morning focus. Afternoon meetings. Evening wind-down. Lumina keeps your lighting in sync—automatically. Meet the smart desk lamp that just works. ✨

Instagram
1) Introducing Lumina 💡
The smart desk lamp that adapts to your day—time, calendar, and ambient light included. Focus-ready in the morning, meeting-perfect at noon, and warm by evening. $149. #LuminaLight #RemoteWork

2) Make your workspace feel effortless. Lumina learns your rhythm and keeps the light just right. No more manual tweaks, no more eye strain. Tap to shop. #DeskSetup #WFH

LinkedIn
1) Remote work deserves smarter lighting. Lumina adjusts brightness and color temperature based on the time of day, your calendar, and ambient room light—so your workspace supports focus without constant manual changes. Now available for $149.

2) Great work starts with great light. Lumina is a smart desk lamp designed for modern professionals—automated adjustments, clean design, and a setup that takes minutes. Launching now at $149.

HERO
Headline: Lumina—light that learns your rhythm.
Subheadline: The smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting.
CTA: Shop Lumina — $149
Secondary CTA: See how it works

WHY LUMINA
Remote work is flexible. Your lighting should be too. Lumina delivers the perfect light for every moment—energizing mornings, crisp midday focus, and warm evenings—without a single manual adjustment.

FEATURES
1) Time-aware lighting
Automatically shifts from bright, cool light in the morning to warmer, softer light in the evening to support your natural energy cycle.

2) Calendar-responsive settings
Big meeting or deep-work block? Lumina adapts your lighting to match the task—without you lifting a finger.

3) Ambient light sensing
Balances your room’s existing light to reduce glare and eye strain.

4) Simple setup, seamless control
Set preferences once in the app. After that, Lumina handles the rest.

5) Designed for your desk
Modern, minimal profile that looks great in any home office.

TESTIMONIALS (Placeholder)
“[Testimonial about improved focus and less eye strain]” — Name, Role
“[Testimonial about effortless setup and beautiful design]” — Name, Role
“[Testimonial about better meetings and mood]” — Name, Role

FAQ
1) How does Lumina know when to change the light?
Lumina uses time of day, your calendar events (optional), and an ambient light sensor to automatically adjust brightness and color temperature.

2) Do I need a subscription?
No. Lumina works out of the box with no subscription required.

3) Can I customize the lighting?
Yes. Use the app to set your preferences and override automatic settings anytime.

4) Does Lumina work without calendar access?
Absolutely. Calendar access is optional—Lumina still adapts based on time and room light.

5) What’s included in the box?
Lumina smart lamp, power adapter, quick-start guide.

6) What is the return policy?
We offer a 30-day return window. If it’s not a fit, send it back for a refund.

CTA SECTION
Bring better light to your workday.
Shop Lumina for $149 and let your desk lighting do the thinking.
[Shop Lumina]

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Your Workday
New $149 lighting solution adjusts to time of day, calendar events, and ambient room light for remote professionals

SAN FRANCISCO, CA — [Month Day, Year] — Lumina today announced the launch of its smart desk lamp designed for modern remote workers. Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting to create an effortless, eye-friendly workspace.

As remote work becomes the norm, professionals are spending more hours under static, poorly tuned lighting that can cause fatigue and strain. Lumina addresses this problem with an intelligent system that delivers the right light at the right time—without manual adjustments.

“Great lighting should be invisible,” said [Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We built Lumina to quietly improve focus and comfort throughout the day. It simply adapts to how you work.”

Lumina features time-aware lighting that transitions from energizing morning brightness to warmer evening tones, calendar-responsive modes that align with meetings and deep work, and an ambient light sensor that balances the room’s existing light. The lamp’s modern design fits any home office and takes just minutes to set up.

Lumina is available now for $149 at [Website URL] and ships immediately.

About Lumina
Lumina creates smart lighting products designed for how people actually work. With a focus on modern design, effortless automation, and wellness-driven experiences, Lumina helps remote professionals feel better and work smarter.

Media Contact
[Name]
[Title]
[Email]
[Phone]
[Website URL]

steps.text:
All files created as requested:

- tagline.txt
- hero-copy.txt
- email-sequence.txt
- social-posts.txt
- landing-page.txt
- press-release.txt

Let me know if you want any revisions or additional assets.
